_meta.description: Four shopper archetypes for the Personalization Performance Doctor demo. These replace all prior persona definitions.

archetypes.profile_description: First visit, no login, no purchase history. Browsing broadly — arrived via organic search or social. No behavioral signals available yet. Bloomreach has no BRUID for this visitor.
archetypes.personalization_gap_note: Without BRUID, Bloomreach cannot serve personalized results. Generic ranking applies. All content is identical to any other anonymous visitor.
archetypes.personalized_results_note: Shown for illustration only — what this visitor would see if identified (expected state when BRUID match rate reaches 70%+)

archetypes.profile_description: Purchased once, recently logged in. Limited behavioral signal — Bloomreach has a BRUID and one transaction, but AutoSegment assignment is still forming. Enough signal to start some personalization.
archetypes.personalization_gap_note: BRUID is present but AutoSegment assignment is thin. Loomi can apply new-customer segment rules, but signal is insufficient for strong 1:1 personalization.
archetypes.personalized_results_note: Some personalization active — new customer segment rule applied. Missing depth of signal limits ranking quality.

archetypes.profile_description: High purchase intent, seasonal. Searching for others, not herself. Price-sensitive — looking under $100. Arrived via 'gifts for her' paid search. No prior Kendra Scott purchase history.
archetypes.personalization_gap_note: Campaign signal from paid search attribution enables gift-intent segment matching even without BRUID. However, without BRUID persistence, this visitor will not be recognised on return visits.
archetypes.personalized_results_note: Gift-intent segment rule applied. Under-$100 gift sets boosted. Price-sensitive framing surfaced.

archetypes.profile_description: Repeat purchaser with known preferences. High lifetime value. Bloomreach has strong BRUID history, AutoSegment membership confirmed, and rich behavioral signals (clicks, carts, purchases) over 12+ months.
archetypes.personalization_gap_note: Strong BRUID + segments + fresh signals. This is the gold standard — Loomi has everything it needs. The contrast between this archetype and Prospective is the core demo story.
archetypes.personalized_results_note: Full 1:1 personalization active. Fine jewelry, new arrivals, and high-price-point items boosted. Editorial content surfaced.
